channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo weekly.

item.title: ☕ Szili1994/create-aeronautics-minecraft-mod (175 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Szili1994

📝 Repository: Szili1994/create-aeronautics-minecraft-mod

📄 Descrizione: aeronautics create minecraft mod github modrinth curseforge create addon sable physics engine simulated offroad airships planes drones vehicles contraptions neoforge forge 1.21.1 1.20.1 download latest version 2026 setup guide tutorial release free multiplayer server performance optimization fps fix error crash**

⭐ Stelle: 175

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: aeronautics-create aeronautics-create-mod aeronautics-minecraft aeronautics-mod allthemods-minecraft create-aeronautics create-aeronautics-mod create-mod minecraft minecraft-2026 minecraft-aeronautics minecraft-create minecraft-create-aeronautics minecraft-gui minecraft-mod minecraft-modpack modded-minecraft neoforge progression-guide

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-27T17:04:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-02T05:41:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ bigchuidw3/spring-ai-agentx (44 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: bigchuidw3

📝 Repository: bigchuidw3/spring-ai-agentx

📄 Descrizione: 基于原生 Spring AI 的智能体（Agent）开发框架，提供 ReAct 执行引擎、分层记忆、工具调度、Human-in-the-Loop 等核心能力，形成完整的 Harness Engineering 方案，帮助开发者快速构建 AI Agent，可以快速搭建 Java 版的 Claude Code。

⭐ Stelle: 44

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-28T07:22:58Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T00:30:17Z

]]>

item.title: ☕ icysymmetra/tiktok-patches-for-morphe (32 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: icysymmetra

📝 Repository: icysymmetra/tiktok-patches-for-morphe

📄 Descrizione: This repository is a Morphe patch source for TikTok. It continues the work from earlier community TikTok patch sets, including ReVanced, with the patches adapted for Morphe and tested against newer TikTok builds. The current target version is TikTok 43.8.3

⭐ Stelle: 32

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

item.title: ☕ UmashankarGouda/AuditTrail (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: UmashankarGouda

📝 Repository: UmashankarGouda/AuditTrail

📄 Descrizione: AuditTrail - A comprehensive full-stack application for deployment tracking, audit management, and change visualization. Features Spring Boot 3 backend, React 18 frontend, PostgreSQL database, and Docker containerization. Batch process 40K+ metadata records with real-time dashboard analytics.

⭐ Stelle: 11

item.title: ☕ smikme/meshapp (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: smikme

📝 Repository: smikme/meshapp

📄 Descrizione: MeshApp is a full-featured desktop client for managing devices and communicating in Meshtastic and MeshCore mesh networks. The application replaces mobile clients on a PC and provides advanced capabilities for monitoring, telemetry visualization, and radio module configuration.
